modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be distracting grammar usage and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to undo or redo changes in Google Sites.

full_description_text: User is trying to undo changes made in Google Sites. They also want to redo some edits. The functionality for these actions seems unclear or not working as expected.
short_description: Unable to undo or redo changes in Google Sites.
description: User is trying to undo changes made in Google Sites. They also want to redo some edits. The functionality for these actions seems unclear or not working as expected.
